mapper.select: select it.issue_type_id, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, it.issue_type_name, it.roadmap_yn, it.description, it.created_at, it.updated_at, it.user_id, ( select listagg(p.project_name, ', ') within group(order by p.project_name) from issue_type_project itp join project p on itp.project_id = p.project_id where itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id and p.owner_id = it.user_id ) as project_names, ( select listagg( case fs.field_code when 'ASSIGNEE' then '담당자' when 'MILESTONE' then '마일스톤' when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then '상위일감' when 'START_DATE' then '시작일' when 'DUE_DATE' then '완료기한' when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then '추정시간' else fs.field_code end || case when fs.required_yn = 'Y' then '(필수)' else '' end, ', ' ) within group( order by case fs.field_code when 'ASSIGNEE' then 1 when 'MILESTONE' then 2 when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then 3 when 'START_DATE' then 4 when 'DUE_DATE' then 5 when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then 6 else 99 end ) from issue_type_field_setting fs where fs.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id and fs.use_yn = 'Y' ) as field_summary from issue_type it join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where it.user_id = #{userId} and ist.user_id = #{userId} order by it.created_at desc, it.issue_type_id desc

select it.issue_type_id, it.initial_status_id, ist.status_name as initial_status_name, it.issue_type_name, it.roadmap_yn, it.description, it.created_at, it.updated_at, it.user_id from issue_type it join issue_status ist on it.initial_status_id = ist.issue_status_id where it.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and ist.user_id = #{userId}
select project_id, project_name from project where owner_id = #{userId} order by created_at desc, project_name

select itp.project_id from issue_type_project itp join issue_type it on itp.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id join project p on itp.project_id = p.project_id where itp.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and p.owner_id = #{userId} order by itp.project_id

select fs.field_code from issue_type_field_setting fs join issue_type it on fs.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where fs.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and fs.use_yn = 'Y' order by case fs.field_code when 'ASSIGNEE' then 1 when 'MILESTONE' then 2 when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then 3 when 'START_DATE' then 4 when 'DUE_DATE' then 5 when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then 6 else 99 end

select fs.field_code from issue_type_field_setting fs join issue_type it on fs.issue_type_id = it.issue_type_id where fs.issue_type_id = #{issueTypeId} and it.user_id = #{userId} and fs.required_yn = 'Y' order by case fs.field_code when 'ASSIGNEE' then 1 when 'MILESTONE' then 2 when 'PARENT_ISSUE' then 3 when 'START_DATE' then 4 when 'DUE_DATE' then 5 when 'ESTIMATED_HOURS' then 6 else 99 end
mapper.insert:
select 'ISSUE_TYPE_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(issue_type_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_type where substr(issue_type_id, 1, 16) = 'ISSUE_TYPE_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_type ( issue_type_id, initial_status_id, issue_type_name, roadmap_yn, description, created_at, updated_at, user_id ) values ( #{issueTypeId}, #{initialStatusId}, #{issueTypeName}, null, #{description}, sysdate, null, #{userId} )

select 'ISSUE_TYPE_PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(issue_type_project_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_type_project where substr(issue_type_project_id, 1, 24) = 'ISSUE_TYPE_PROJECT_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_type_project ( issue_type_project_id, issue_type_id, project_id, created_at ) values ( #{issueTypeProjectId}, #{issueTypeId}, #{projectId}, sysdate )

select 'FIELD_SETTING_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_' || lpad( nvl(max(to_number(substr(field_setting_id, -4))), 0) + 1, 4, '0' ) from issue_type_field_setting where substr(field_setting_id, 1, 19) = 'FIELD_SETTING_' || to_char(sysdate, 'YYMM') || '_'
insert into issue_type_field_setting ( field_setting_id, issue_type_id, field_code, use_yn, required_yn, created_at, updated_at ) values ( #{fieldSettingId}, #{issueTypeId}, #{fieldCode}, #{useYn}, #{requiredYn}, sysdate, null )
